summary: The full-block downloader divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in block/body validation, polling, and retry paths; no downloader behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 181: M	crates/net/p2p/src/full_block.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to None, return, continue, and Poll::Ready/Pending expressions.
No header/body completion checks, consensus body validation, bad message reporting, retry scheduling, budget handling, or response future polling behavior changed.
